principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss Design with Organic Real Estate aesthetics.
Emotion First: Trust, Clarity, and Efficiency.
Content is King: Data density with breathing room.
Zoom In: Focus on key metrics (Rent Collected, Unpaid).
Negative Space: Use white space to separate bank accounts and tenant lists.
Contrast: High contrast for readability (Black text on White, Bold Emerald for success).
anti_patterns: No generic 'SaaS Blue' or 'Teal' for CTAs.
No centered layouts for data tables.
No gradients on backgrounds (flat, clean surfaces).

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, card headers, and major metrics.

body.usage: Use for all standard text, table data, and labels.

mono.usage: Use for transaction IDs, IBANs, and raw numerical data.

primary.name: Deep Emerald
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, 'Paid' status indicators.

layout.alignment: Left-aligned text for all data. Right-aligned for currency.
layout.cards: Flat style, 1px border (border-slate-200), no shadow or very subtle shadow-sm.

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-900 hover:bg-emerald-800 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col gap-4

inputs.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-md px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-900/20 focus:border-emerald-900 transition-all

status_badges.paid: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
status_badges.unpaid: bg-orange-100 text-orange-800 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
status_badges.pending: bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise texture on the sidebar background if possible.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (Regular weight) or Lucide React.
visual_enhancers.motion: Micro-interactions on hover. Smooth transitions for page loads. No 'springy' bounces, keep it professional.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add '@fontsource/manrope' and '@fontsource/plus-jakarta-sans' to package.json and import them in index.js.
2. TAILWIND CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js to include the new font families and the Emerald/Orange color palette.
3. SHADCN OVERRIDES: When using Shadcn components, override the default 'radius' to be smaller (0.3rem) for a sharper, more professional look.
4. LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy for the Dashboard. Do not just stack cards vertically.
5. NOTIFICATIONS: Use 'Sonner' for toast notifications. Style them to match the Emerald/Orange theme.
6. CHARTS: Use Recharts for the 'Cash Flow' and 'Occupancy' charts. Style them with the theme colors.
7. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element (buttons, inputs, links) has a 'data-testid' attribute.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop' - no generic centered layouts.
Dark colors look good independently, avoid dark gradients.
